global.description: The ad features a modern design with a purple gradient background and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel service for booking hotels and flights easily.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Abstract geometric shapes in lighter shades of purple, creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A large, light purple circular shape positioned towards the center of the ad.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A rectangular area in the center featuring the main message, with a clean and modern design.

elements.label: Secondary content area
elements.description: Another rectangular area below the main content, providing additional information.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Fly smarter Hotels + flights in one tap' prominently displayed.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Learn more' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner, featuring the text 'CloudRoute' in a simple font.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, positioned near the logo.

elements.label: Additional message
elements.description: Text below the main message providing more context about the service offered.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: Small text in the top left corner, reading 'CloudRoute', indicating the brand.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A button at the bottom center with the text 'Learn more', inviting user interaction.

elements.label: UGC tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, positioned near the logo.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, modern minimalist with vibrant colors, key elements include a call to action and main message.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is positioned at the top left, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
